world_api_dea.title: Global - DEA Background Check
world_api_dea.description: Comprehensive background check service using DEA (Drug Enforcement Administration) databases. Search by full name OR document number with document type. Verify individuals against international drug enforcement records.

usa_api_vehicle.title: USA - Vehicle Verification
usa_api_vehicle.description: Retrieve U.S. vehicle details by license plate and state (NHTSA-backed decode). Use plate and state as query parameters.

colombia_api_simit_agreements.title: Colombia - SIMIT Payment Agreements
colombia_api_simit_agreements.description: Verify active payment agreements for transit fines registered in SIMIT.

feature_kyc_solution.title: KYC Solution
feature_kyc_solution.description: Bundled Verifik KYC solution: identity, document, biometrics, and watchlist checks orchestrated end-to-end. Used as the default reference for full KYC flows.

peru_identity_lookup.title: Peru - National ID Verification
peru_identity_lookup.description: Verify a Peruvian citizen by national ID (DNI). Provide documentType DNIPE and documentNumber; returns identity fields drawn from official records for KYC and onboarding flows.

colombia_api_vehicle_complete.title: Colombia - Complete Vehicle Information
colombia_api_vehicle_complete.description: Get comprehensive vehicle information for Colombian vehicles. Includes ownership details, specifications, legal status, and registration data.

colombia_api_driver.title: Colombia - Driver License Verification (RUNT)
colombia_api_driver.description: Verify Colombian driver license status and validity through the RUNT system.

colombia_api_registraduria_voting.title: Colombia - Electoral Records Verification
colombia_api_registraduria_voting.description: Electoral records verification service for Colombia citizens. Provides voting status and electoral information.

colombia_api_vehicle.title: Colombia - Basic Vehicle Information
colombia_api_vehicle.description: Retrieve general registration data and basic characteristics of a Colombian vehicle by its license plate.

colombia_api_simit_suspensions.title: Colombia - SIMIT License Suspensions
colombia_api_simit_suspensions.description: Check for driver license suspensions or cancellations in the SIMIT system.

chile_api_vehicle.title: Chile - Vehicle Verification
chile_api_vehicle.description: Query by license plate (plate, no spaces or dots). Typical fields include make, model, year, VIN/chassis, engine, color, vehicle type, fines summary, and owner RUT when the registry exposes them—use for fleet onboarding, collateral checks, and claims workflows.

colombia_api_vehicle_complete_by_vin.title: Colombia - Complete Vehicle Report (By VIN)
colombia_api_vehicle_complete_by_vin.description: Get an exhaustive history and technical report of a vehicle in Colombia using its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN).

brasil_api_identity_lookup.title: Brazil - National ID Verification
brasil_api_identity_lookup.description: Confirms a Brazilian natural person’s CPF against official sources. Provide CPF, date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY, and the document number with or without separators; when the data matches, the response returns normalized name parts and identifiers. Built for KYC, fraud prevention, and regulated onboarding.

communication_global_email_otp.title: Email OTP
communication_global_email_otp.description: Send a one-time passcode by email for user verification flows. Provide the recipient address and message parameters; the API delivers the OTP and returns send/delivery metadata for KYC and login confirmation.

colombia_api_rues.title: Colombia - RUES Business Lookup (v2, legacy)
colombia_api_rues.description: Legacy v2 API: validate Colombian business registration in RUES by NIT. Returns essential company data at lower catalog cost. For a full dossier use GET /v2/co/rues/complete, or prefer v3 endpoints for new integrations.

colombia_api_identity_lookup.title: Colombia - National ID Verification
colombia_api_identity_lookup.description: Verify Colombian national ID (cédula) information. Get full name, document status, and basic citizen verification data.

colombia_api_rethus.title: Colombia - Health Records Verification
colombia_api_rethus.description: Access Colombian health records through Rethus system. Verify medical history, health status, and healthcare provider information. Requires document type (CC, CE, PPT) and document number.

colombia_api_contraloria_certificate.title: Colombia - Certificate of Fiscal Responsibility (Contraloría)
colombia_api_contraloria_certificate.description: Certificate of fiscal responsibility from the Contraloría General de la República.

venezuela_api_identity_lookup.title: Venezuela - National ID Verification
venezuela_api_identity_lookup.description: This route returns identity data for Venezuelan nationals using the CCVE (Cédula de Identidad) document class. Send the cédula number as documentNumber; the API resolves the record and returns structured name fields for KYC, onboarding, and fraud checks. For foreign residents, use GET /v2/ve/foreigner-id (CEVE) instead.

mexico_api_vehicle.title: Mexico - Vehicle Verification
mexico_api_vehicle.description: The Vehicle Information service provides detailed information about a vehicle in Mexico based on its license plate number. This service specifically returns information about a vehicle's make, model, year, VIN, and other related details. Pass the plate in the plate query parameter on a GET request; responses include registration-oriented fields when a match is found.

world_api_interpol.title: Global - Interpol Background Check
world_api_interpol.description: International background check using Interpol databases. Search by full name OR document number with document type. Verify individuals against international criminal records and wanted lists.

world_api_ofac.title: Global - OFAC Sanctions Check
world_api_ofac.description: Check individuals and entities against OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control) sanctions lists. Search by full name OR document number with document type. Verify compliance with US economic sanctions.

mexico_identity_lookup.title: Mexico - National ID Verification
mexico_identity_lookup.description: This endpoint verifies a Mexican national’s CURP (Clave Única de Registro de Población) against official records. Send documentType and documentNumber on a GET request; a successful response confirms the identity record and returns validated name and biographical fields when the CURP is recognized.

peru_api_vehicle.title: Peru - Vehicle Verification
peru_api_vehicle.description: The Peruvian Vehicle Information service provides detailed data about registered vehicles in Peru based on their license plate number. The response includes key details such as the vehicle's make, model, year, engine and chassis serial numbers, seating capacity, and usage type.

peru_api_vehicle_soat.title: Peru - Vehicle Verification
peru_api_vehicle_soat.description: This service provides information on the insurance status of a vehicle in Peru. It returns details including the insurance company name, policy start and end dates, vehicle plate number, policy number, usage type, vehicle class, and policy status.

colombia_api_simit_subpoenas.title: Colombia - SIMIT Traffic Subpoenas
colombia_api_simit_subpoenas.description: Look up active transit subpoenas (comparendos) associated with an ID or vehicle.

colombia_api_min_trabajo.title: Colombia - Labor Certificates Verification
colombia_api_min_trabajo.description: Labor certificates verification service for Colombia. Provides work-related certifications and labor status information.

colombia_api_criminal_history.title: Colombia - Legal Background Check
colombia_api_criminal_history.description: Legal background verification service for Colombia citizens. Provides information about legal proceedings and judicial records.

costarica_api_identity_lookup.title: Costa Rica - National ID Verification
costarica_api_identity_lookup.description: This endpoint verifies the CCCR (Cédula de Identidad Costarricense) against official sources. Send documentType as CCCR and the documentNumber (cédula number without spaces) on a GET request; the response includes structured name fields for KYC, onboarding, and fraud checks.

chile_api_transport_vehicle.title: Chile - Public Transport Vehicle
chile_api_transport_vehicle.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services for Chile public transport vehicles.

panama_api_vehicle.title: Panama - Vehicle Verification
panama_api_vehicle.description: Look up a Panamanian vehicle by license plate. Returns make, model, year, and registration metadata for compliance and underwriting checks.

chile_api_business_lookup.title: Chile - Company Lookup
chile_api_business_lookup.description: This service allows you to retrieve information about a company in Chile by providing its document type and number. The service response will contain the name of the company, its business category, subcategory, and activity. Additionally, this service will provide you with a list of services for which the company is authorized to work.

ecuador_api_vehicle_fines.title: Ecuador - Vehicle Fines
ecuador_api_vehicle_fines.description: Look up an Ecuadorian vehicle by plate (license plate). Returns registration details and outstanding fines for compliance, fleet, and risk checks.

colombia_api_simit_subpoenas_details.title: Colombia - SIMIT Subpoena Details
colombia_api_simit_subpoenas_details.description: Get detailed information regarding a specific transit subpoena, including infraction type and cost.

brasil_api_company_lookup.title: Brazil - Company Lookup
brasil_api_company_lookup.description: Verifies a Brazilian legal entity against official CNPJ registers. Send documentType=CNPJ and a 14-digit documentNumber with no punctuation. Typical fields include registration status, address, legal nature, and primary and secondary economic activities. Use it for KYB, vendor due diligence, and compliance programs.

colombia_api_dian_invoicer.title: Colombia - DIAN Electronic Invoicer Status
colombia_api_dian_invoicer.description: Verify electronic invoicing (facturación electrónica) registration status with DIAN.

api_colombia_contracts.title: Colombia - Government Contracts Verification
api_colombia_contracts.description: Verify government contracts and procurement records in Colombia.

colombia_api_police_rnmc.title: Colombia - Police Records Check
colombia_api_police_rnmc.description: Police records verification service for Colombia citizens. Provides information about police interactions and records.

colombia_api_dian.title: Colombia - Tax Information Verification
colombia_api_dian.description: Verify tax information through Colombia's DIAN (Dirección de Impuestos y Aduanas Nacionales) system. Check tax status, obligations, and compliance records. Requires document type and document number.

peru_api_company_lookup.title: Peru - Business Registration Lookup
peru_api_company_lookup.description: Business verification service for Peru. Provides company registration details, legal status, and business information.

colombia_api_judicial_process_details.title: Colombia - Judicial Process Details
colombia_api_judicial_process_details.description: Comprehensive details of a specific judicial process in Colombia using its process number.

colombia_api_vehicle_soat.title: Colombia - Vehicle SOAT Status
colombia_api_vehicle_soat.description: Verify the active SOAT (Compulsory Traffic Accident Insurance) policies and details for a given vehicle plate.

colombia_api_simit_resolutions.title: Colombia - SIMIT Resolutions
colombia_api_simit_resolutions.description: Access formal resolutions for traffic infractions that have reached the sanction stage.

world_api_covid.title: Global - COVID Statistics
world_api_covid.description: Look up COVID-19 statistics by country and date. Returns aggregated cases, deaths, and recovery counters for analytics and dashboards.

colombia_api_affiliations.title: Colombia - Health & Social Security Affiliations
colombia_api_affiliations.description: Verify health and social security affiliations for Colombia. Access EPS, ARL, and pension information.

colombia_api_registraduria_certificate.title: Colombia - Electoral Records Verification
colombia_api_registraduria_certificate.description: Electoral records verification service for Colombia citizens. Provides voting status and electoral information.

colombia_api_delinquent_debtors.title: Colombia - Delinquent Debtors (BDME)
colombia_api_delinquent_debtors.description: Check if a person or company is listed in the BDME (Base de Datos de Morosos) delinquent debtors registry.

ecuador_api_identity_lookup.title: Ecuador - National ID Verification
ecuador_api_identity_lookup.description: Verify an Ecuadorian citizen using documentType CCEC and documentNumber. Returns identity fields from official records to support KYC and compliance.

ecuador_api_vehicle.title: Ecuador - Vehicle Verification
ecuador_api_vehicle.description: Query an Ecuadorian vehicle by plate (no spaces or periods). Use for verification, insurance, fleet, and compliance workflows.

colombia_api_simit_complete.title: Colombia - SIMIT Complete Transit History
colombia_api_simit_complete.description: Comprehensive transit background check including fines, agreements, and suspensions by ID.

world_api_europol.title: Global - Europol Background Check
world_api_europol.description: European background check using Europol databases. Search by full name OR document number with document type. Verify individuals against European criminal records and intelligence databases.

colombia_api_judicial_processes.title: Colombia - Judicial Processes
colombia_api_judicial_processes.description: Search for judicial processes using document number across Colombian courts.

panama_api_identity_full_lookup.title: Panama - National ID Verification
panama_api_identity_full_lookup.description: Extended Panamanian identity verification. Provide the cédula to retrieve full identity fields including names, dates, and registry metadata for KYC.

ecuador_api_criminal_history.title: Ecuador - Criminal History
ecuador_api_criminal_history.description: Ecuador criminal history lookup. Provide the citizen's document number to verify pending records and judicial background for compliance and hiring workflows.

panama_api_identity_lookup.title: Panama - National ID Verification
panama_api_identity_lookup.description: Verify Panamanian CCPA (Cédula de Identidad Personal) data against official civil-registry sources. Send documentType (CCPA), a normalized documentNumber, and dateOfBirth in DD/MM/YYYY; the response confirms that the identity record is consistent for KYC, customer onboarding, and fraud controls.

spain_api_identity_lookup.title: Spain - National ID Verification
spain_api_identity_lookup.description: Verifies a Spanish natural person’s identity against official sources using documentType (DNIES or NIE), documentNumber (no spaces), and date (expiry in DD/MM/YYYY). Use for KYC, fraud prevention, and regulated onboarding.

peru_identity_extra_lookup.title: Peru - National ID Verification
peru_identity_extra_lookup.description: Extended Peruvian identity lookup with additional personal fields. Provide documentType DNIPE and documentNumber; returns enriched identity data when available.

usa_api_driver_license_lookup.title: USA - Driver License Verification
usa_api_driver_license_lookup.description: This service allows developers to validate the status, restrictions, endorsements, and designations of Florida driver licenses. By providing a valid Florida driver license number, the service response with the license status, expiration date, restrictions, endorsements, and designations.

communication_global_messaging_whatsapp.title: Global - WhatsApp Messaging
communication_global_messaging_whatsapp.description: Send WhatsApp messages globally through Verifik's gateway. Provide the recipient phone number, template, and variables; useful for OTP delivery, transactional alerts, and KYC notifications.

biometrics_id_scan_only.title: ID Document Scan
biometrics_id_scan_only.description: ID document scan-only flow: capture and parse an identity document without biometric matching. Returns OCR fields and document validation signals for KYC pipelines.

brasil_api_vehicle.title: Brazil - Vehicle Verification
brasil_api_vehicle.description: The Verifik API returns a normalized vehicle record for that plate, including plate, brand, model, model year and year of manufacture, chassis (VIN), engine, color, body type, fuel type, transmission, doors, manufacturer or plant, FIPE codes where they apply to the vehicle, and irregularity or restriction indicators when they exist for that registration. Use it to confirm the unit in front of you matches the official line before you continue.

argentina_api_identity_lookup.title: Argentina - National ID Verification
argentina_api_identity_lookup.description: Verify an Argentine identity using documentType DNIAR and documentNumber. Returns identity fields to support KYC and compliance.

ecuador_api_company_lookup.title: Ecuador - Company Lookup
ecuador_api_company_lookup.description: Look up an Ecuadorian company using documentType RUCEC and documentNumber (13 digits, no separators). Returns registration-oriented fields to support KYB, vendor screening, and compliance.

colombia_special_api_police_identity_loo.title: Colombia - Police Records Check
colombia_special_api_police_identity_loo.description: Check police records through Colombia's National Police system. Verify interactions with law enforcement and police records. Requires document type, document number, and expedition date.

colombia_api_military_situation.title: Colombia - Military Service Records
colombia_api_military_situation.description: Verify military service records through Colombia's military system. Check service status, military obligations, and service records. Requires Colombian ID (CC) and document number.

world_api_onu.title: Global - UN Sanctions Check
world_api_onu.description: Check individuals and entities against United Nations sanctions lists. Search by full name OR document number with document type. Verify compliance with international sanctions regimes.

feature_passwordless_solution.title: Passwordless Authentication
feature_passwordless_solution.description: Passwordless authentication solution that pairs identity verification with biometric proof. Onboards users without passwords while keeping a verifiable audit trail.

colombia_api_sena.title: Colombia - SENA Certificates
colombia_api_sena.description: Verify SENA (Servicio Nacional de Aprendizaje) training and certification records.

world_api_fbi.title: Global - FBI Background Check
world_api_fbi.description: Comprehensive background check using FBI (Federal Bureau of Investigation) databases. Search by full name OR document number with document type. Verify individuals against federal criminal records.

colombia_api_pico_placa.title: Colombia - Pico y Placa Restrictions
colombia_api_pico_placa.description: Check current transit restrictions (Pico y Placa) for a specific vehicle across various Colombian cities.

feature_pdf_generator.title: PDF Report Generator
feature_pdf_generator.description: Generate PDF reports from Verifik validations. Aggregates fetched records into a downloadable, audit-ready document for compliance teams.

chile_api_identity_lookup.title: Chile - National ID Verification
chile_api_identity_lookup.description: Verify Chilean national ID (RUN/RUT): confirm name and identity fields against official civil-registry sources for KYC, onboarding, and fraud prevention.

colombia_api_vehicle_complete_by_plate.title: Colombia - Complete Vehicle Report (By Plate)
colombia_api_vehicle_complete_by_plate.description: Get an exhaustive history and technical report of a vehicle in Colombia using its license plate number.

colombia_api_lawyers.title: Colombia - Lawyers Verification
colombia_api_lawyers.description: Verify lawyer registration and professional status with the Colombian bar.

ip-lookup.title: IP Geolocation Lookup
ip-lookup.description: Geolocate an IPv4 or IPv6 address. Returns country, region, city, ISP/ASN, and risk hints for fraud screening and access-control checks.

colombia_api_runt_owners.title: Colombia - Vehicle Owners Verification (RUNT)
colombia_api_runt_owners.description: Verify vehicle ownership and registered owners through the RUNT system.

communication_messaging_sms.title: SMS Messaging
communication_messaging_sms.description: Send SMS messages via Verifik's global gateway. Provide the destination phone number and message body; supports OTPs, transactional alerts, and notification flows with delivery metadata in the response.

communication_colombia_messaging_whatsap.title: Colombia - WhatsApp Messaging
communication_colombia_messaging_whatsap.description: Send WhatsApp messages from a Colombia-routed sender via Verifik's gateway. Provide recipient, template, and variables for transactional alerts, OTPs, and KYC notifications.

usa_api_ssn.title: USA - SSN Verification
usa_api_ssn.description: Validate a U.S. Social Security Number (SSN). Pass the SSN as the documentNumber query parameter (formatted as on the document).

colombia_api_identity_lookup_extra.title: Colombia - National ID Verification
colombia_api_identity_lookup_extra.description: The same integration is available as POST with a JSON body containing the same fields. GET uses query parameters as shown below.

world_api_phone_lookup.title: Global - Phone Lookup
world_api_phone_lookup.description: Phone number intelligence lookup. Returns carrier, line type, country, and validity signals to support fraud and onboarding checks.

colombia_special_api_identity_lookup.title: Colombia - Private Citizen Information
colombia_special_api_identity_lookup.description: Access private citizen information for Colombian nationals. This service provides comprehensive personal data including detailed identity verification. Contact Verifik customer service for more details.

credit_intent_kyc_passwordless.title: KYC Passwordless Credit Intent
credit_intent_kyc_passwordless.description: Create a credit purchase intent for the Passwordless KYC flow. Returns the intent id and pricing metadata used to settle on-chain via x402 before launching the KYC session.

colombia_pep_lookup.title: Colombia - Politically Exposed Persons (PEP) Lookup
colombia_pep_lookup.description: Check if a person is listed as politically exposed (PEP) for compliance purposes.

bolivia_api_identity_lookup.title: Bolivia - National ID Verification
bolivia_api_identity_lookup.description: Verify a Bolivian citizen using documentType CI, documentNumber, and dateOfBirth (DD/MM/YYYY). Returns identity fields to support KYC and compliance.

chile_api_driver_license.title: Chile - Driver License
chile_api_driver_license.description: Look up a Chilean driver license by its license number (query documentNumber): returned fields typically include RUT, license class, restrictions, control dates, municipality, and address, subject to registry availability—useful for fleet, workforce, and KYC checks where driving credentials matter.

api_autodata_manufacturers.title: Vehicle Manufacturers Database
api_autodata_manufacturers.description: Vehicle manufacturers reference dataset. Returns the list of supported makes (and metadata) used to scope downstream Autodata vehicle queries.

colombia_api_sisconmp.title: Colombia - SISCONMP Transport Verification
colombia_api_sisconmp.description: Verify transport and cargo operator registration in the SISCONMP system.

colombia_api_vehicle_complete_by_plate_s.title: Colombia - Simplified Vehicle Report
colombia_api_vehicle_complete_by_plate_s.description: A streamlined version of the vehicle background check focusing on essential legal and physical status markers.

canada_api_driver_license_ontario.title: Canada - Driver License
canada_api_driver_license_ontario.description: Use this service to validate and verify the authenticity of Ontario driver's licenses efficiently. Whether you need to confirm the validity of a driver's license for identification or regulatory purposes, this service provides accurate and up-to-date license information.

canada_api_driver_license_quebec.title: Canada - Driver License
canada_api_driver_license_quebec.description: Validate a Canadian (Quebec) driver license. Provide the license number and supporting fields; returns issuance, status, and identity metadata for KYC checks.

ocr_scan_pro.title: OCR Document Scan Pro
ocr_scan_pro.description: Production-grade OCR for ID documents. Submit an image (URL or Base64) and receive structured identity fields plus raw extracted text for downstream KYC and onboarding workflows.

ocr_scan_gpt.title: OCR Document Scan Prompt
ocr_scan_gpt.description: GPT-powered OCR for ID documents and other scans. Submit an image and receive structured fields (i.e. names, document numbers, dates) plus the raw extracted text for downstream KYC workflows.

el_salvador_api_identity_lookup.title: El Salvador - National ID Verification
el_salvador_api_identity_lookup.description: Verifik's Identity Verification API helps you authenticate Salvadoran citizens using official government data. It's designed to streamline your KYC (Know Your Customer) processes, prevent fraud, and ensure you meet all regulatory requirements effortlessly.

paraguay_api_identity_lookup.title: Paraguay - National ID Verification
paraguay_api_identity_lookup.description: Verify a Paraguayan citizen using documentNumber (CIC). Returns identity fields to support KYC and compliance.

canada_api_driver_license_british-columb.title: Canada - Driver License
canada_api_driver_license_british-columb.description: The British Columbia Driver License Verification service offers a straightforward method to verify the authenticity and validity of a driver's license in the province of British Columbia, Canada. By utilizing this service, you can quickly validate a driver's license based on the provided document number and last name.

colombia_api_identity_ce_foreigner_id.title: Colombia - Immigration Status Verification
colombia_api_identity_ce_foreigner_id.description: Immigration records verification service for Colombia. Provides immigration status and foreigner registration information.

colombia_api_identity_pep_foreigner_id.title: Colombia - Immigration Status Verification
colombia_api_identity_pep_foreigner_id.description: Immigration records verification service for Colombia. Provides immigration status and foreigner registration information.

ocr_scan_studio.title: OCR Document Scan Studio
ocr_scan_studio.description: The Scan Studio offers a seamless and efficient solution for extracting critical information from scanned documents through state-of-the-art Optical Character Recognition (OCR) technology. To use this service, simply provide the document image in Base64-encoded format or a URL where the image is hosted, and let our system handle the rest.

canada_api_company.title: Canada - Company Lookup
canada_api_company.description: Look up a Canadian legal entity in provincial business registries using business (company name) and province (two-letter code). Typical fields include business number, status, registry identifiers, and address. Use for KYB, vendor due diligence, and compliance.

face_recognition_search_live_face.title: Live Face Search
face_recognition_search_live_face.description: Runs liveness on a single probe image and, if passed, performs 1:N search in a collection.

face_recognition_compare.title: Face Comparison
face_recognition_compare.description: Compares a probe image against one or more gallery images and returns a similarity score. Use search_mode to balance speed and accuracy.

face_recognition_compare_live.title: Live Face Comparison
face_recognition_compare_live.description: Compares a live probe image against a gallery and performs liveness validation on the probe. Both comparison and liveness thresholds are configurable.

face_recognition_liveness.title: Face Liveness Detection
face_recognition_liveness.description: Detects whether a submitted face image comes from a live person or a spoof (photo, screen replay, printed copy). Returns a liveness score and a pass/fail outcome based on a minimum score threshold.

face_recognition_verify.title: Face Verification
face_recognition_verify.description: Verifies that one or more probe face images match a specific enrolled person identified by id (MongoDB person _id). Returns the enrolled profile and a similarity score when the match meets min_score. Use optional collection_id to scope the check.

face_recognition_detect.title: Face Detection
face_recognition_detect.description: Detect human faces in an image. Returns bounding boxes and quality signals; commonly used as a pre-step before liveness or face-compare flows.

face_recognition_search_crops.title: Face Search (Crops)
face_recognition_search_crops.description: Performs 1:N face search using cropped face images instead of full frames. Use this when you only have tight face crops (for example after detection or from a low-resolution pipeline). Validation requires a higher minimum score than the standard Face Search endpoint (min_score 0.5–1 here vs 0.2–1 on /search).

face_recognition_search.title: Face Search
face_recognition_search.description: Searches one or more images against a face collection and returns potential matches ranked by similarity.

mexico_api_company.title: Mexico - Company Lookup
mexico_api_company.description: This endpoint looks up a Mexican legal entity by its FME (Folio Mercantil Electrónico) identifier. Use GET with documentType=FME and documentNumber to retrieve official registration details such as legal business name and city from government commercial registry sources.

colombia_api_vehicle_valores_fasecolda_b.title: Colombia - Fasecolda Vehicle Values (by Plate)
colombia_api_vehicle_valores_fasecolda_b.description: Get vehicle commercial values from Fasecolda by license plate.

colombia_api_vehicle_valores_fasecolda_b.title: Colombia - Fasecolda Vehicle Values (by Code)
colombia_api_vehicle_valores_fasecolda_b.description: Get vehicle commercial values from Fasecolda by vehicle code.

colombia_api_simit_plate.title: Colombia - SIMIT Fines by Plate
colombia_api_simit_plate.description: Look up traffic fines and sanctions directly associated with a specific vehicle license plate.

argentina_api_vehicle.title: Argentina - Vehicle Verification
argentina_api_vehicle.description: The Argentine Vehicle Information service provides detailed information about vehicles registered in Argentina using their license plate number. This service returns comprehensive vehicle data including make, model, year, engine specifications, and registration details.

colombia_api_rues_full.title: Colombia - RUES Complete (v2, legacy)
colombia_api_rues_full.description: Legacy v2 API: retrieves complete Colombian business information from RUES by NIT—including registry, representatives, and economic activities. Higher cost than basic v2 because more official data is aggregated in one response.

usa_api_company.title: USA - Company Lookup
usa_api_company.description: Look up a U.S. company by full or partial business name using SEC EDGAR data. Send business in the JSON body of a POST request.

colombia_api_vehicle_sinister_fasecolda_.title: Colombia - Fasecolda Accident History
colombia_api_vehicle_sinister_fasecolda_.description: Check vehicle accident and claim history from Fasecolda by plate.

brasil_api_criminal_history.title: brasil api criminal history
brasil_api_criminal_history.description: Brazil individual background screening using CPF and date of birth. A successful response includes identity-related fields and, when the data provider supplies it, a base64-encoded PDF report. Intended for employment screening, due diligence, and compliance; handle the PDF and metadata under your own legal and retention rules.

costa_rica_api_business_lookup.title: Costa Rica — Company Lookup (NITE)
costa_rica_api_business_lookup.description: KYB lookup for Costa Rican companies: GET /v2/cr/company with documentType NITE and documentNumber for registration and business verification.

argentina_api_company_lookup.title: Argentina - Company Lookup
argentina_api_company_lookup.description: Look up an Argentine company using documentType CUIT and documentNumber. Returns registration fields to support KYB, vendor screening, and compliance.

bolivia_api_business_lookup.title: Bolivia - Company Lookup
bolivia_api_business_lookup.description: Look up a Bolivian company using documentType NIT and documentNumber. Returns registration fields to support KYB, vendor screening, and compliance.

colombia_api_vehicle_accidentality_bogot.title: Colombia - Bogota Vehicle Accidents
colombia_api_vehicle_accidentality_bogot.description: Look up accident records and traffic incidents registered specifically within the Bogota municipal transit database.

colombia_api_vehicle_tax.title: Colombia - Vehicle Tax Status
colombia_api_vehicle_tax.description: Check the payment status and history of annual vehicular taxes (Impuesto de Vehículos).

colombia_api_lawyers_certificate.title: Colombia - Lawyers Verification
colombia_api_lawyers_certificate.description: Obtain lawyer certification and professional status verification.

colombia_api_judicial_records.title: Colombia - Judicial Records
colombia_api_judicial_records.description: Access judicial background records and legal history for Colombian citizens.

paraguay_api_business_lookup.title: Paraguay - Company Lookup
paraguay_api_business_lookup.description: Look up a Paraguayan company using documentType RUC and documentNumber. Returns registration fields to support KYB, vendor screening, and compliance.

chile_api_validate.title: chile api validate
chile_api_validate.description: Submit RUN or RUT, document number, and printed serial to obtain a vigency-style status from civil or tax validation sources—use when the physical ID must be confirmed, not only the number.

chile_api_taxpayer_lookup.title: chile api taxpayer lookup
chile_api_taxpayer_lookup.description: Returns name fields and identifiers aligned with tax registry usage—ideal for KYB, supplier onboarding, and invoice validation where the RUT must match registered taxpayer data.

paraguay_api_vehicle.title: Paraguay - Vehicle Verification
paraguay_api_vehicle.description: Look up a vehicle by license plate (plate). Returns registration, owner, and vehicle details for verification and compliance.

costa_rica_api_vehicle.title: Costa Rica — Vehicle Verification
costa_rica_api_vehicle.description: Look up a Costa Rican vehicle by license plate: GET /v2/cr/vehicle with required query parameter plate; returns owner and vehicle details, infraction and ownership history when available.

usa_api_vehicle_lookup_by_vin.title: USA - Vehicle Lookup by VIN
usa_api_vehicle_lookup_by_vin.description: Decode a U.S. vehicle by VIN using the vin query parameter (exactly 17 characters).

guatemala_api_identity_lookup.title: Guatemala - National ID Verification
guatemala_api_identity_lookup.description: Verifik's Identity Verification API helps you authenticate Guatemalan citizens using official government data. It's designed to streamline your KYC (Know Your Customer) processes, prevent fraud, and ensure you meet all regulatory requirements effortlessly.

colombia_api_vehicle_fines_medellin.title: Colombia - Medellin Transit Fines
colombia_api_vehicle_fines_medellin.description: Verify outstanding local traffic penalties and fines restricted to the city of Medellin.

colombia_api_vehicle_fines_bogota.title: Colombia - Bogota Transit Fines
colombia_api_vehicle_fines_bogota.description: Verify outstanding local traffic penalties and fines restricted to the city of Bogota.

honduras_api_identity_lookup.title: Honduras - National ID Verification
honduras_api_identity_lookup.description: Verifik's Identity Verification API helps you authenticate Honduran citizens using official government data. It's designed to streamline your KYC (Know Your Customer) processes, prevent fraud, and ensure you meet all regulatory requirements effortlessly.

republica_dominicana_api_citizen_lookup.title: Dominican Republic - National ID Verification
republica_dominicana_api_citizen_lookup.description: Verifik's Identity Verification API helps you authenticate Dominican citizens using official government data. It's designed to streamline your KYC (Know Your Customer) processes, prevent fraud, and ensure you meet all regulatory requirements effortlessly.

venezuela_foreigner_api.title: Venezuela - Immigration Status Verification
venezuela_foreigner_api.description: Immigration records verification service for Venezuela. Provides immigration status and foreigner registration information.

bolivia_api_vehicle.title: Bolivia - Vehicle Verification
bolivia_api_vehicle.description: Look up a vehicle by license plate (plate). Returns registration and vehicle details for verification and compliance.

uruguay_api_identity_lookup.title: Uruguay - National ID Verification
uruguay_api_identity_lookup.description: Verify Uruguayan identification by documentType=CCUY, documentNumber, and dateOfBirth.

spain_api_company_lookup.title: Spain - Company Lookup
spain_api_company_lookup.description: Look up a Spanish legal entity using documentNumber (company tax identifier, e.g. CIF). Returns core registration-oriented fields to support KYB, vendor screening, and compliance.

panama_api_business_lookup.title: Panama - Company Lookup
panama_api_business_lookup.description: Query Panama’s RUC (Registro Único de Contribuyente) registry. Send documentType (RUC), the company documentNumber, and the dv (verification digit). Typical uses include KYB, vendor onboarding, and compliance reviews when you need legal name, status, representatives, and key commercial fields in one HTTPS response.

validate-document.title: validate-document
validate-document.description: Validate a captured Colombian identity document image. Returns document liveness and authenticity signals to harden KYC document-capture flows.

peru_api_identity_ce_foreigner_id.title: Peru - Immigration Status Verification
peru_api_identity_ce_foreigner_id.description: Immigration records verification service for Peru. Provides immigration status and foreigner registration information.

colombia_api_rues_full_v3.title: Colombia - RUES Complete (v3)
colombia_api_rues_full_v3.description: Retrieves complete Colombian business information from the RUES registry (NIT + category). Same parameters as GET /v3/co/rues, with commercial registry, economic activities, establishments, and legal representatives. Higher cost than the v3 summary endpoint due to full data aggregation.

colombia_api_rues_v3.title: Colombia - RUES Summary (v3)
colombia_api_rues_v3.description: V3 basic RUES lookup by NIT and registry category (RM, PROP, RNT, ESAL, etc.). Returns a normalized category summary—not the full dossier. Lower cost; use colombia_api_rues_full_v3 for representatives, activities, and establishments.

peru_identity_extra_lookup_v3.title: Peru - National ID Verification
peru_identity_extra_lookup_v3.description: Returns extended RENIEC DNI data for Peruvian citizens: full name, civil status, dates, photo (base64), address, ubigeo, and verification digit. Send documentType=DNI and the 8-digit documentNumber.

peru_identity_lookup_v3.title: Peru - National ID Verification
peru_identity_lookup_v3.description: Standard Peruvian DNI (v3) identity check against RENIEC: validates that the document number matches official records and returns core identity fields (name, dates, civil status, address, etc.). Use documentType=DNI and the 8-digit documentNumber.

colombia_api_identity_ppt_foreigner_id.title: Colombia - Immigration Status Verification
colombia_api_identity_ppt_foreigner_id.description: Immigration records verification service for Colombia. Provides immigration status and foreigner registration information.

colombia_api_min_trabajo_v3.title: Colombia - Labor Certificates Verification
colombia_api_min_trabajo_v3.description: Labor certificates verification service for Colombia. Provides work-related certifications and labor status information.

colombia_sisben_api_lookup.title: Colombia - SISBEN Score Verification
colombia_sisben_api_lookup.description: Verify SISBEN (Sistema de Identificación de Potenciales Beneficiarios) score and classification.

face_recognition_detect_face.title: Face Detection
face_recognition_detect_face.description: Detect and validate the presence of a human face in an image. Useful as a pre-step for liveness or face-compare flows; returns face bounding boxes and quality signals.

peru_api_company_lookup_v3.title: Peru - Company Lookup
peru_api_company_lookup_v3.description: Look up a Peruvian company by RUC (documentType=RUC and the business documentNumber). Returns legal name, status, address, and taxpayer condition from official registries—useful for KYB, onboarding vendors, and due diligence.

document-liveness.title: Document Liveness Detection
document-liveness.description: Check whether a captured ID image is a real document or a screen/print attack. Returns liveness scores and indicators to harden KYC document-capture flows.

consultar_procesos_judiciales.title: Colombia - Judicial Processes
consultar_procesos_judiciales.description: Check complete judicial history and active legal processes.

credit_intent.title: Credit Purchase Intent
credit_intent.description: Create a Verifik credit purchase intent for x402 settlement. Returns the intent id and pricing metadata used to confirm the on-chain payment for downstream API calls.

Mexico_api_ine_model_e.title: Mexico - INE Model E
Mexico_api_ine_model_e.description: Validate a Mexican INE document, Model E. Provide the OCR/MRZ fields from the credential to verify authenticity against the INE registry.

Mexico_api_ine_model_d.title: Mexico - INE Model D
Mexico_api_ine_model_d.description: Validate a Mexican INE document, Model D. Provide the OCR/MRZ fields from the credential to verify authenticity against the INE registry.

Mexico_api_ine_model_c.title: Mexico - INE Model C
Mexico_api_ine_model_c.description: Validate a Mexican INE document, Model C. Provide the OCR/MRZ fields from the credential to verify authenticity against the INE registry.

api_autodata_enginer.title: Vehicle Engine Database
api_autodata_enginer.description: Vehicle engine reference dataset. Look up engine families and specifications used by other Autodata endpoints.

api_autodata_enginer_code.title: Vehicle Engine Code Lookup
api_autodata_enginer_code.description: Resolve a vehicle engine by its engineer/manufacturer code. Returns engine specs and compatibility data for parts and diagnostics workflows.

data_finance_incomestatement.title: Financial - Income Statement
data_finance_incomestatement.description: Public-company income statement data. Provide a ticker to retrieve revenue, expenses, and earnings line items for financial analysis.

data_finance_balancesheet.title: Financial - Balance Sheet
data_finance_balancesheet.description: Public-company balance sheet data. Provide a ticker to retrieve assets, liabilities, and equity line items used in financial analysis.

data_finance_cashflow.title: Financial - Cash Flow
data_finance_cashflow.description: Public-company cash flow statement data. Provide a ticker to retrieve operating, investing, and financing cash flow line items.

data_finance_stockprice.title: Financial - Stock Price
data_finance_stockprice.description: Stock price quotes for public companies. Provide a ticker to retrieve current and historical price data for analytics and dashboards.

canada_api_driver_license_alberta.title: Canada - Driver License
canada_api_driver_license_alberta.description: Validate a Canadian (Alberta) driver license. Provide the license number and supporting fields; returns issuance, status, and identity metadata for KYC checks.

us_api_passport_entries.title: us api passport entries
us_api_passport_entries.description: Submit firstName, lastName, dateOfBirth, passportNumber, and passportCountry as query parameters. Date format should match your integration contract (commonly YYYY-MM-DD or dd/mm/yyyy).

api_data_sheet_vehicle_by-plate_br.title: Brazil - Vehicle Data Sheet (by Plate)
api_data_sheet_vehicle_by-plate_br.description: Extended Brazilian vehicle technical data sheet by plate (data-sheet-by-plate): richer vehicle specification fields than the basic plate lookup, subject to registry coverage.

face_recognition_search_active_user.title: Face Search (Active User)
face_recognition_search_active_user.description: Performs 1:N search using a single probe image without liveness. Intended for active-user verification flows.

spain_api_vehicle_lookup.title: Spain - Vehicle Verification
spain_api_vehicle_lookup.description: Returns vehicle information for a Spanish registration plate, including fields such as make, model, year, and vehicle type when a match exists.

colombia_api_inpec.title: Colombia - INPEC Penitentiary Records
colombia_api_inpec.description: Verify penitentiary and incarceration records through the INPEC system.

colombia_sigep_by_name.title: Colombia - SIGEP Public Officials Search
colombia_sigep_by_name.description: Search Colombian public officials and government contractors by full name. Access contact information, positions, and organizational details from the SIGEP database.

colombia_sigep_by_number.title: Colombia - SIGEP Official Lookup by Document
colombia_sigep_by_number.description: Look up Colombian public officials and government contractors using their ID number (CC or NIT). Get complete professional information from SIGEP records.

colombia_inpec_lookup.title: Colombia - INPEC Penitentiary Records
colombia_inpec_lookup.description: Look up penitentiary records and incarceration history.

zelf-proofs.title: Zelf Proofs
zelf-proofs.description: Zelf Proofs service for identity verification and document validation. This service provides comprehensive proof generation capabilities for various identity documents and verification processes.

zelf-proof-liveness-active-user.title: Zelf Proof with Liveness (Active user)
zelf-proof-liveness-active-user.description: Zelf Proof with Liveness detection service for enhanced identity verification. This service provides proof generation with active liveness detection to ensure the person is physically present during verification.

guatemala_api_identity_extra_lookup.title: Guatemala - Identity Verification full
guatemala_api_identity_extra_lookup.description: Standard identity verification service for Guatemala citizens. Verifies personal information and document authenticity.

india_api_epic_lookup.title: CONSULTAR EPIC INDIA
india_api_epic_lookup.description: Metodo para consultar datos de un ciudadano en India usando EPIC (Voter ID)

india_api_epic_voting_lookup.title: CONSULTAR VOTACION EPIC INDIA
india_api_epic_voting_lookup.description: Metodo para consultar informacion de votacion de un ciudadano en India usando EPIC (Voter ID)

co_bogota_taxi_plate.title: Colombia - Bogotá Taxi Driver by Plate
co_bogota_taxi_plate.description: Taxi driver and vehicle verification in Bogotá by plate number. Retrieves driver and vehicle-related data associated with the taxi plate.

co_bogota_taxi_driver_card.title: Colombia - Bogotá Taxi Driver by Card
co_bogota_taxi_driver_card.description: Taxi driver verification in Bogotá by driver card/license number. Retrieves driver-related data associated with the provided card.

colombia_api_identity_lookup_premium.title: Colombia - National ID Premium Verification
colombia_api_identity_lookup_premium.description: Premium Colombian citizen lookup (CC only). Resolves the expedition date automatically, then returns the same enriched fields as /v2/co/cedula/extra. Higher cost reflects chained upstream processing.
